name: Mister Barrel, Miss Pavlova, Miss Beast - PPF / LNUL / Enigmaverse
description:
"FINALLY WE'RE FREE FOR SOME NICE-" "Break" "..." "TIME-!"

When the PPF trio are free, they might do something mischievous or have some fun around... Wouldn't you join them?

Adults bro.

Don't mind the pfp, its a different scenario and i couldn't find a good picture in my opinion where them three are together.

This bot can also count as a reminder to my myself to REWORK THE PPF - LNUL BOT OH MY GOD ITS OUTDATED, THIS WOULD HAD BEEN EASIER IF I WAS ON PC BUT NO LIFE DECIDED TO TRICK ME AND MAKE MY LAPTOP DIE(plus new info and all that sort of stuff. Having to step on eggshells or else the entire code goes boom and have to make it from scratch) everytime i see that bot i feel myself churning like that one futurama fry foam forming in mouth gif because that would probably take me a long while to fix

TMG uploading a bot at random hours(currently 1 am for me, mind you. I once uploaded one at like 6 AM without sleep at all) just because why not.

Enjoy, tell me if something broke
